creator: X-user2008@yandex.ru
text:
1) System freeze with conky: launching conky in Xorg with my config causes complete system freeze after some time.

2) There is stable memory leak (12 Kb per second) if you use net-[upload|download] and/or disk-[read|write] meters.

How-To-Repeat: 1) Run conky with this config: http://pastebin.com/QS0GtgFZ

2) Run conky with the above config plus add ${diskio_write} or ${diskio_read} or ${upspeed} or ${downspeed} somewhere in this config
